Interface IRasterWorkspace4

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to additional members that control a raster workspace.

[Guid("2EEB0761-2D5A-459B-8B71-C19A810FB896")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRasterWorkspace4
